description_long: This object consists of a pair of futuristic, stylized shotguns with a striking red and orange flame motif along the length of their bodies. The shotguns feature angular, robust frames with black and metallic accents, and the barrels are relatively short with squared-off muzzles. The grips are ergonomic and appear reinforced, with visible mechanical details and gold-colored fasteners. The top of each shotgun has a rail-like structure, possibly for mounting accessories, and the sides display intricate paneling and vent-like features. The overall design is aggressive and modern, suggesting a high-tech or sci-fi context. The shotguns are compact, making them suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A pair of compact, futuristic shotguns with red and orange flame designs, black accents, and angular, robust frames. The design is aggressive and modern, with ergonomic grips and detailed mechanical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared-off muzzles and the parallel alignment of the two shotguns, highlighting the top rails and the width of the barrels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full flame motif, ergonomic grips, and mechanical details along the body, as well as the angular design of the frames.
description_view_2: Top view emphasizing the rail structures, the symmetry of the shotguns, and the distribution of color and paneling along the upper surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored flame motif, mechanical fasteners, and the robust construction of the grips and frames.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel; both barrels are parallel and of equal length, with no visible ribbing or venting.
attribute_stock_type: pistol grip; no full stock is visible.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
